title: AllayMail
description: Allays can deliver packages to players.
body:
![An "oh shit, for real?" meme about Allays being able to send E-mail. The meme template is originally about BonziBuddy.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dbfd527658698f2e8381f4ec24d4b6c0773289bf_0.webp)

### A simple mod that makes allays a lot more useful.

When given a written book, a Book&Quill or a bundle with a player's nickname in the name, Allays will teleport to them and stay near until the mail is taken.

Only works if the player is online. If they're not, the allay will just stick around doing nothing. They will teleport as soon as the player joins, unless in unloaded chunks.

Writable books and bundles are intended to be renamed in anvils or otherwise, while written books are supposed to be signed with the name.

![A screenshot of an anvil screen, with the bundle being renamed to a player name. My name.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0e11339887e8f528f8fb6486225a9e3329abec18_0.webp)

The player gets a sound notification and a text notification above their hotbar every time the allay teleports to them.

![A screenshot of the text notification, as well as the subtitles from the sound notification.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5fb67136a8fb0aa02290fe5536aa2007a23d6f9e_0.webp)

Any player can take the package, and it does drop if the allay dies.

This does not work across dimensions. 

It is teleportation, so it doesn't load chunks between the starting point and the destination.

Not required on the client side.
